title: Buraidah, Al Qassim — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Buraidah, Al Qassim: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Buraidah is a city in Al Qassim with a population of 610,000. The capital of Al Qassim Province, a major agricultural center known for date production in central Saudi Arabia.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
